_summarySemantics.totalCodeLines: Count all non-blank added ('+') code lines in the commit diff. Do not include deleted or blank lines.
_summarySemantics.fullGeneratedCodeLines: Subset of added code lines whose genRatio is 100.
_summarySemantics.partialGeneratedCodeLines: Subset of added code lines whose genRatio is greater than 0 and less than 100.

_blameSemantics.blame: VCS blame attribution recorded at write time by the codeAgent. It must come directly from real git blame or svn blame output, not from synthetic, inferred, replay-reconstructed, or manually edited data.
_blameSemantics.blame.sourceContract: AlgC assumes embedded blame is authoritative VCS blame captured at write time from git blame or svn blame.
_blameSemantics.blame.revisionId: [mandatory] The VCS commit SHA (git) or revision number (svn) that last introduced the current form of this line.
_blameSemantics.blame.originalFilePath: [mandatory] The file path inside the repository where this line originated (may differ from fileName due to renames or moves).
_blameSemantics.blame.originalLine: [mandatory] The line number inside originalFilePath at the originating revision.
_blameSemantics.blame.timestamp: [mandatory for add entries] ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the originating revision. Enables AlgC startTime~endTime filtering. Not required for delete entries.
_blameSemantics.blame.author: [optional] The committer identity (email or username) of the originating revision.
_blameSemantics.delete_entry_blame: For changeType=delete, only revisionId + originalFilePath + originalLine are required — together they are the stable identity key to locate the line in the accumulated surviving set. timestamp and author are not needed.

_repositorySemantics.revisionTimestamp: [mandatory] ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the commit described by this record (i.e. the timestamp of REPOSITORY.revisionId). AlgC sorts all genCodeDesc files by revisionTimestamp and processes those with revisionTimestamp <= endTime in ascending order to accumulate the surviving-line set.

_detailSemantics.model: INCREMENTAL — each commit's DETAIL records only lines ADDED or DELETED in that commit, not the full snapshot of all surviving lines.
_detailSemantics.changeType_add: changeType=add: a line introduced by this commit. Required fields: changeType, lineLocation (or lineRange), genRatio, genMethod, blame (full: revisionId, originalFilePath, originalLine, timestamp). author is optional.
_detailSemantics.changeType_delete: changeType=delete: a line removed by this commit. Required field: blame.revisionId + blame.originalFilePath + blame.originalLine — this triple is the identity key. lineLocation is optional (was the location before deletion, useful for debugging). No genRatio or genMethod.
_detailSemantics.algC_accumulation: AlgC processes files in ascending revisionTimestamp order (for revisionTimestamp <= endTime). Within each file, deletes are applied before adds (standard diff order). Result: surviving_lines keyed by (revisionId, originalFilePath, originalLine). Then filter by blame.timestamp in [startTime, endTime] and sum genRatio.
_detailSemantics.delete_range: For bulk deletion of a contiguous block from the same origin, a single delete entry may use blame.originalLineRange={from,to} instead of repeating one entry per line.
_detailSemantics.manual: changeType=add with genRatio=0 and genMethod=Manual represents a human-written line introduced by this commit.
_detailSemantics.lineRange_constraint: A lineRange entry is only valid when all lines in that range share the same blame origin (same revisionId, originalFilePath, and a contiguous originalLine block). Lines with different blame origins must each have their own entry.
